creator: bestbuyrdp@gmail.com
text:
https://bestbuyrdp.com


Bestbuyrdp was eastablished in 2015 and offers FreeBSD virtual private servers (Droplets) from Five data centers around the world. Droplets range in size and price, supporting hourly or monthly billing with snapshot functionality. All Droplets are created on SSD drives for ideal performance. FreeBSD support was added in the fourth quarter of 2015.
